Buffer Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x8
Size:
0x4

Description

Hardware-driven status flags for the circular buffer.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:2] RESERVED rw 0x0 -
[1] FULL r 0x0 FULL
[0] EMPTY r 0x1 EMPTY

Field Descriptions

FULL - FULL

Set by hardware when buffer is full. (write_ptr + 1) % 2048 == read_ptr

EMPTY - EMPTY

Set by hardware when buffer is empty. write_ptr == read_ptr
